expectations.text: event_analytics.info.yml contains core_version_requirement with BOTH ^10 AND ^11: '^10 || ^11'
Dependencies listed in 'drupal:node' format with project prefix

expectations.text: .module file only created if hooks are actually implemented inside it

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en event_analytics returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en event_analytics -y returned exit code 0, module enabled

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs: 0 errors, 2 warnings (TODO format only — warnings are not errors)

notes: Perfect score. Correct core_version_requirement (^10 || ^11), project-prefixed dependency (drupal:node), no spurious .module file, explicit type declaration, successful enable, clean phpcs (zero errors).
